svg.title: Complete RAG Engineering Pipeline
svg.desc: Full RAG pipeline including indexing, retrieval, generation phases, plus evaluation and query rewriting layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are best practices for parsing PDFs and Word documents in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategies exist beyond sliding window?')
sendPrompt('How do I choose embedding model dimensions and which multilingual models exist?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between IVFFlat and HNSW indexes in pgvector?')
sendPrompt('How should I design the documents and document_chunks tables for multi-tenancy?')
sendPrompt('How does query rewriting improve RAG retrieval quality?')
sendPrompt('Explain HyDE and Multi-Query rewriting strategies in depth')
sendPrompt('Should I use the same embedding model for queries and documents?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between cosine similarity and dot product for vector search?')
sendPrompt('How does cross-encoder reranking work and when should I use Cohere Rerank?')
sendPrompt('How do I calculate available context window tokens dynamically for RAG prompts?')
sendPrompt('How does Tool Calling differ from naive RAG?')
sendPrompt('What are the most effective system prompt instructions to prevent hallucination?')
sendPrompt('How should retrieved context be formatted inside the prompt for best results?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a citations UI to show document sources to users?')
sendPrompt('How does Ragas measure faithfulness in a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('How do I measure answer relevancy automatically using Ragas?')
sendPrompt('What is context recall and how is it different from precision in RAG evals?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Ragas for automated RAG evaluation in a CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement metadata pre-filtering before vector search in pgvector?')
sendPrompt('What is hybrid search combining BM25 and vector search, and when should I use it?')
sendPrompt('How should I tune connection pool size for Serverless Postgres with concurrent embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What are best practices for input validation with Zod in a RAG API?')

svg.text: ★ = topics not covered in original doc
New additions: Query rewriting, Reranking, Context budget, Evals
Click any node to dive deeper
